svg.title: ci-cd advanced architecture diagram
svg.desc: Developer pushes to GitHub repository, triggering a GitHub Actions pipeline of build, test, and deploy jobs. The deploy job exchanges a GitHub OIDC token with an AWS IAM OIDC provider to assume an IAM role, which syncs the build to a private S3 bucket read only by CloudFront via Origin Access Control, serving visitors over HTTPS. Terraform provisions and manages the OIDC provider, IAM role, S3 bucket, and CloudFront distribution.

g.text: runs on push to main only

svg.text: provisions & reconciles every resource above — one `terraform apply` rebuilds the whole stack
